idea-plugin.name: LanguageManager
idea-plugin.description:
LanguageManager helps you manage JSON, YAML, and Laravel PHP localization files in JetBrains IDEs.

Create isolated file schemes, search and edit translations in a joined table, detect malformed files, and review missing values, duplicates, missing locales, and usage suggestions.

繁體中文說明

管理專案中的 JSON、YAML 與 Laravel PHP 在地化語言檔。可建立彼此獨立的檔案方案，使用表格搜尋與編輯翻譯，檢查格式錯誤、缺失值、重複翻譯、缺少語言及使用率建議。
